videoSnippet.title: Romantic Chess Making a Comeback! || Gukesh vs Praggnanandhaa || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournamentsDownload Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Gukesh D (2732) - Praggnanandhaa R (2733)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [17] 2026.06.04
E24 Nimzo-Indian, Saemisch variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 Bb4 4.a3 Bxc3+ 5.bxc3 b6 6.f3 Nc6 7.e4 Na5 8.Bd3 Ba6 9.Qe2 c5 10.Nh3 cxd4 11.cxd4 Rc8 12.e5 Ng8 13.Nf2 f5 14.g4 Nb3 15.Bb2 Nxa1 16.gxf5 Nb3 17.Rg1 Nh6 18.f6 gxf6 19.Ne4 fxe5 20.Nd6+ Kf8 21.Qxe5 Qh4+ 22.Kd1 Rg8 23.Rxg8+ Nxg8 24.Nxc8 Bxc8 25.Kc2 Na5 26.d5 Qh6 27.Kb1 exd5 28.cxd5 d6 29.Qg3 Nb7 30.Bc1 Qg7 31.Qh4 Qf7 32.Ba6 Qf5+ 33.Ka2 Qxd5+ 34.Bc4 Qf5
